description.content: Generate images using Stable Image Core, a fast and affordable model for high-quality image generation.

item.name: Generate an image using Stable Image Core

request.name: Generate an image using Stable Image Core

description.content: Generates an image from a text prompt using the Stable Image Core model. This endpoint provides fast and affordable generation with high-quality results suitable for most use cases. Requests use multipart form data encoding.

formdata.description: (Required) Text describing what you wish to see in the output image.
Text describing elements to exclude from the output image.
Controls the aspect ratio of the generated image. (This can only be one of 16:9,1:1,21:9,2:3,3:2,4:5,5:4,9:16,9:21)
A value to control randomness in generation.
The output format of the generated image. (This can only be one of jpeg,png,webp)
An optional style preset to guide the image model towards a particular visual style.

Generate images using Stable Diffusion 3 and 3.5 models with advanced text-to-image and image-to-image capabilities.

item.name: Generate an image using Stable Diffusion 3

request.name: Generate an image using Stable Diffusion 3

description.content: Generates an image using Stable Diffusion 3 or 3.5 models. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image generation modes. When an image is provided along with a prompt, the model uses it as a reference guided by the strength parameter. Requests use multipart form data encoding.

formdata.description: (Required) Text describing what you wish to see in the output image.
Text describing elements to exclude from the output image.
An optional input image for image-to-image generation. When provided, the model uses this image as a reference guided by the strength parameter.
Controls how much influence the input image has on the output. Lower values produce images closer to the input, higher values allow more creative deviation. Only applicable for image-to-image mode.
Controls the aspect ratio of the generated image. Only applicable for text-to-image mode. (This can only be one of 16:9,1:1,21:9,2:3,3:2,4:5,5:4,9:16,9:21)
The Stable Diffusion 3 model variant to use for generation. (This can only be one of sd3,sd3-turbo,sd3.5-large,sd3.5-large-turbo,sd3.5-medium)
A value to control randomness in generation.
The output format of the generated image. (This can only be one of jpeg,png,webp)
The generation mode. Use text-to-image for prompt-only generation or image-to-image when providing a reference image. (This can only be one of text-to-image,image-to-image)

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

A value to control randomness in generation.
The output format of the generated image. (This can only be one of jpeg,png,webp)
The generation mode. Use text-to-image for prompt-only generation or image-to-image when providing a reference image. (This can only be one of text-to-image,image-to-image)

Generate images using Stable Image Ultra, the highest quality model for state-of-the-art photorealistic and artistic image generation.

item.name: Generate an image using Stable Image Ultra

request.name: Generate an image using Stable Image Ultra

description.content: Generates a high-quality image from a text prompt using the Stable Image Ultra model. This endpoint produces state-of-the-art results with exceptional detail, lighting, and composition. Requests use multipart form data encoding.

formdata.description: (Required) Text describing what you wish to see in the output image. Strong, descriptive prompts that clearly define elements, colors, and subjects lead to better results.
Text describing elements to exclude from the output image.
Controls the aspect ratio of the generated image. (This can only be one of 16:9,1:1,21:9,2:3,3:2,4:5,5:4,9:16,9:21)
A value to control randomness in generation. Set to 0 for a random seed. Using the same seed with the same parameters produces similar results.
The output format of the generated image. (This can only be one of jpeg,png,webp)

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
(Required) Text describing what you wish to see in the output image. Strong, descriptive prompts that clearly define elements, colors, and subjects lead to better results.
Text describing elements to exclude from the output image.

A value to control randomness in generation. Set to 0 for a random seed. Using the same seed with the same parameters produces similar results.
The output format of the generated image. (This can only be one of jpeg,png,webp)

info.name: Stability AI Stable Image Generate API

description.content:
The Stability AI Stable Image Generate API provides text-to-image generation capabilities powered by models including Stable Diffusion 3.5 and Stable Image Ultra. Developers can generate high-quality images from text prompts with control over style, dimensions, and output format. The API supports multiple model tiers including Stable Image Core for fast and affordable generation and Stable Image Ultra for state-of-the-art quality results.

Contact Support:
 Name: Stability AI Support
